title: ARSAT desarrolló CryptoComm, un sistema de seguridad criptográfica post-cuántica
description: ARSAT (state telecommunications company) announces CryptoComm, a post-quantum (PQC) secure communications system for messages and files, with a high-speed symmetric cipher (318-bit keys) and post-quantum key/certificate generation; presented Jan 2023, hardware version with INVAP planned.

title: Comunicaciones seguras: Métodos Cuánticos y Poscuánticos 2022
description: ARSAT page on a 2022 secure-communications conference addressing quantum threats to public-key and symmetric cryptography, and ARSAT's development of quantum-resistant (post-quantum) defense tools.

title: Se aprobó la Segunda Estrategia Nacional de Ciberseguridad
description: Argentine government announcement (2023) of the Second National Cybersecurity Strategy. WebFetch confirmed it does NOT explicitly mention post-quantum cryptography or quantum-resistant algorithms.

title: Segunda Estrategia Nacional de Ciberseguridad (consulta pública)
description: Public-consultation draft of the Second National Cybersecurity Strategy. No confirmed explicit PQC reference in search snippets.

title: Centro Nacional de Ciberseguridad
description: Argentine National Cybersecurity Center institutional page. No explicit PQC document; general cybersecurity mandate.

title: Normativa - Ciberseguridad | Dirección Nacional de Ciberseguridad
description: Index of cybersecurity regulations from Argentina's National Cybersecurity Directorate. Listing page; no explicit PQC document identified.

title: El BCRA actualiza las normas de riesgos de tecnología y seguridad de la información
description: Central Bank of Argentina update to technology and information-security risk rules for financial entities. Addresses cryptography algorithms generally; no explicit post-quantum/quantum-resistant reference found.

title: Comunicación A 8249 (BCRA, riesgos de TI y seguridad de la información)
description: BCRA communication on minimum requirements for management of technology and information-security risks. No explicit PQC reference confirmed.

title: Cyber.Ar 2026: lanzan el primer Congreso de Ciberdefensa de las Fuerzas Armadas
description: Announcement of Argentina's first Armed Forces Cyberdefense Congress (Sept 2026), organized by Army/Joint military faculties; post-quantum cryptography listed among topics. Journalistic source about an academic/military event, not an institutional PQC document.

title: Ciberdefensa, inteligencia artificial y riesgo cuántico: una agenda estratégica para la Argentina
description: Opinion column arguing Argentina must integrate post-quantum cryptography into national policy. Non-institutional (journalism/opinion).

title: Ciberseguridad poscuántica en América Latina: desafíos y estrategias regulatorias (UCALP)
description: Academic article (Universidad Católica de La Plata) on post-quantum cybersecurity in Latin America with Argentina as a case study. University publication, not institutional/government.
